refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks clarifies the scope and enables targeted verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and delineated work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and work-zone delineation.
DP3: Generate a geospatial digital map integrating terrain, obstacles, and zones.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP3: Generate a geospatial digital map integrating terrain, obstacles, and zones.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms
Integration of work-zone boundaries with obstacle data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates sub-functions into a single geospatial map, minimizing cross-module dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data from vehicle and teleoperation modules.
Risk of incomplete or outdated data affecting map accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust validation of mapping outputs.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing obstacle detection and terrain analysis if coupling increases in future refinements.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and generation of the worksite geospatial map integrating terrain, obstacles, and work-zone data.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite map data to planning and execution functions.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and external systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the mapping function is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not perform mapping; high diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Teleoperation focuses on control and remote operation; mapping logic here would increase diffusion risk.
Safety Services uses mapping data but does not generate it; mapping logic here inappropriate.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Mapping functionality is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize processing and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded.
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module load and consider offloading pre-processing to Vehicle or Teleoperation if performance issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by validating generated maps against known site data and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping function to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Evaluate performance impact on NGHE Solution module during integration testing.
Refine sensor data interface specifications for robustness.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet requirements and architectural criteria with acceptable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules is accurate and timely.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capacity.
open_risks: Performance bottlenecks in NGHE Solution module.
Data latency or loss affecting map accuracy.
evidence_needed: Integration test results showing mapping accuracy and performance.
Verification reports comparing generated maps to ground truth.
